target.conclusion: log(True Range / prior close * 100); multiplying by 100 only shifts the intercept

standardization.policy: weighted mean and scale are fitted only on the records passed to fit_ridge; validation/test rows are transformed with stored training statistics

freezeIntegrity.trainingPolicy: development assets only, labels through each asset's frozen 2024 validation end

storm.definition: forecast percentile >= 90; actual True Range above its strictly-prior 252-observation 90th percentile
